channel.title: Computer Organization on Peter LIU的个人Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Computer Organization on Peter LIU的个人Blog

item.title: 计算机架构
item.description:
Computer Organization

CPU(central processing unit)

ALU(arithmetic logic unit)

  • logic
  • shift
  • arithmetic operations

control unit

  • contrl the operation of CPU

    • computer divided by instructions

      • CISC(complex instruction set computers)

        • programmer’s works are easier
        • a large set of instructions

      • RISC(reduced instruction set computers)

        • programmer’s works are more difficult
        • simple instructions

    • the process of computer program

      • ways of processing

        • pipelining

        • Parallel processing

          • SISD
          • SIMD
          • MISD(JUST CONCEPT)
          • MIMD

      • a cycle

        • fetch
        • decode
        • execute

a set of registers

  • Data registers

  • Instruction registers

    • instruction set

      • opcode
      • operand

  • Program counter

Cache memory

contains a copy of a portion of main memory

accelerate the process

procedure

  • CPU checks the cache

    • if it’s in cache ,get it
    • if not, cache will go get it

main memory

address space

  • adress

Data(organized as words)

  • RAM(random access memory)

    • SRAM(static)

      • fast
      • expensive

    • DRAM(dynamic)

      • slow
      • inexpensive

  • ROM(read-only) memory

    • PROM(cannot erase)
    • EPROM(can erase by ultraviolet light)
    • EEPROM(can erase by electronic impulses)

I/O(input/output) subsystem

input

  • hard disk
  • USB
  • CD/DVD
  • keyboard

output

  • monitor
  • printer

catagories

  • Nonstorage devices

  • Storage devices

    • magnetic
    • optical

adress

  • isolated I/O method
  • memory-mapped I/O method

connected by bus

data bus

address bus

control bus
